content: To access paid services, please link a payment card. The person who connects the card will automatically be assigned as the Payer for this account.

comment.text: This text explains why a payment method is needed to use paid services and clarifies the role of the person linking the card as the account's Payer. It appears as a descriptive message displayed when no payment method is linked in the payment settings section. This helps users understand the requirements for accessing premium features.

usage.context:
<div>
 <Text fontSize="16px" fontWeight={700}>
 {t("NoPaymentMethod")}
 </Text>
 <Text className={styles.noPaymentDescription}>
 {t("NoPaymentMethodDescription")}
 </Text>
 <div className={styles.buttonWrapper}>
 <Button
 label={t("AddPaymentMethod")}
 size={ButtonSize.small}
